category_sources: Official GitHub README describes ctlptl as a CLI for declaratively setting up local Kubernetes clusters.
source_facts.description says ctlptl makes local Kubernetes clusters easy to set up.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading and repository name are ctlptl.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository contains a docs directory.
Official README provides install, usage, goals, and feature documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/tilt-dev/ctlptl; per instruction, repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README lists support for Docker Desktop, KIND, Minikube, and K3D.
source_facts.description and source_facts.executables identify a Kubernetes CLI.
